item.title: 随着人工智能收紧光刻瓶颈，ASML 释放定价能力和两年产能冲刺信号
item.summary: During the question-and-answer session of ASML's second-quarter 2026 earnings call on July 15, executives at the world's only maker of extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography systems signaled that they now have room to raise prices and are preparing to expand output of their most important machines by roughly 30% in each
